stories.headline: At least 26 killed in Russian strikes across Ukraine as Zelenskyy denounces Moscow's 'cynicism'
stories.summary: On Monday, Moscow announced a ceasefire during its World War II victory celebrations over 9 May, while Kyiv has said it will halt fire over 6 May.

stories.summary: A blast at a fireworks factory in Hunan province has killed 26 people and injured 61, state media report.

stories.headline: Gulf braces itself for potential escalation with Iran

stories.headline: Nine coal miners die in gas explosion in Colombia

stories.summary: Venezuela must repay $60 billion in defaulted bonds as it looks to stabilize its economy.

stories.headline: Ex-FedEx Driver Who Killed 7-Year-Old Athena Strand Is Sentenced to Death
stories.summary: Tanner Horner kidnapped and strangled the girl, Athena Strand, after delivering a package to her home in Texas. The package was her Christmas gift, a set of Barbies.

stories.summary: The money would go toward security improvements as part of an East Wing construction project, including a new ballroom that President Trump has said would be built with private dollars.

stories.headline: Alphabet Returns to Euro Debt Market for Latest AI Megabond Deal
stories.summary: Alphabet Inc. needs to borrow heavily to fund investments in artificial intelligence, and it’s increasingly tapping every market to do so.

stories.headline: End Quarterly Earnings Reports? Here’s the Debate
stories.summary: For more than 50 years, public companies in the US have been required to report earnings on a quarterly basis. That would change if a proposal by regulators allowing twice-yearly financial disclosures is adopted.

stories.headline: Latam Airlines Changes Guidance on Fuel Cost Despite Profit Jump

stories.headline: Ambev Soars Most Since 1999 as Brazil Beer Boosts Earnings
stories.summary: Shares of Ambev SA, the Brazilian unit of Anheuser-Busch InBev NV, soared the most in over 27 years after stronger-than-expected beer volumes in the South American nation drove a beat in first quarter earnings.
